creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
Unfortunately I don't have a lot of details because the system completely hangs in this case and I'm forced to hard reboot.

What I've noticed is that when I'm doing something heavy in I/O and CPU, in my case this has always been while doing a big compilation, and running bhyve, the system will randomly completely lock up.

The build I'm running:

FreeBSD bsdell 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #57 main-n253016-a3d71fffa786: Tue Feb  8 17:10:15 CET 2022     root@bsdell:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I'm on a Dell XPS running drm-devel-kmod
